publishedAbstract: NooBaa is designed to be resource-efficient and is included as a Multcloud Object Gateway object storage feature in ODF. Some customers may not need the functionality of object storage, or uses NooBaa infrequently. In this instance, NooBaa is not utilizing unneeded resources. However, in the event NooBaa/MCG is utilized more frequently, and used to it's max potential by users/workloads (clients), NooBaa is most likely going to need performance tuning. If NooBaa has not been tuned for performance yet, and it is heavily utilized, please see the [Performance tuning guide for Multicloud Object Gateway (NooBaa)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/6719951) solution. Once the above solution has been reviewed, implemented, and the below error is shown in the NooBaa logs, it may be necessary to increase the `max_connections` in the `noobaa-postgres-config` configmap to allow more connections to the db. ~~~ error: sorry, too many clients already ~~~
publishedTitle: All PostgreSQL Clients Exhausted noobaa-db-pg-0 - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
